ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Could not Open Related Notes by Tag sidebar: No available leaf.
ast.target: 无法打开“按标签关联笔记”侧边栏：没有可用的叶子。

ast.name: name
ast.target: 打开侧边栏

ast.name: text
ast.target: 文件夹排除

ast.name: text
ast.source: Exclude files from specific folders when finding related notes. Use absolute paths from vault root (e.g., /Personal/Journal).
ast.target: 在查找相关笔记时排除特定文件夹中的文件。使用从库根目录开始的绝对路径（例如 /Personal/Journal）。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 启用与使用说明

ast.name: text
ast.source: To activate the Related Notes by Tag sidebar:
ast.target: 要启用“按标签关联笔记”侧边栏：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Click the ribbon icon (tag icon) in the top right if visible
ast.target: 如果可见，请点击右上角的功能区图标（标签图标）

ast.name: text
ast.source: Or use the command palette (cmd/ctrl-P on desktop, pull down from top of Obsidian on mobile) and search for: "Related Notes by Tag: Open sidebar"
ast.target: 或者使用命令面板（桌面端 cmd/ctrl-P，移动端从 Obsidian 顶部下拉），并搜索：“Related Notes by Tag: Open sidebar”

ast.name: text
ast.target: 用法：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Click tag group header to expand/collapse group
ast.target: 点击标签组标题以展开/折叠该组

ast.name: text
ast.source: Click note name to open in current tab
ast.target: 点击笔记名称在当前标签页打开

ast.name: text
ast.source: Cmd/ctrl-click note name to open note in a new tab
ast.target: Cmd/ctrl-点击笔记名称在新标签页打开

ast.name: text
ast.source: Click Name/Date to change sort order
ast.target: 点击名称/日期以更改排序顺序

ast.name: text
ast.source: No folders excluded yet. Click "Add Folder Path" to create one.
ast.target: 尚未排除任何文件夹。点击“Add Folder Path”创建一个。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 当前笔记没有标签。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No other notes found with matching tags.
ast.target: 未找到具有匹配标签的其他笔记。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No active note or not a markdown file.
ast.target: 没有活动笔记或不是 Markdown 文件。

ast.name: title
ast.source:
Hold Cmd/Ctrl + hover to preview
Click to open
ast.target:
按住 Cmd/Ctrl + 悬停以预览
点击打开
